query:
SELECT 
  s.ageGroup,
  s.name as stageName,
  COUNT(q.id) as questionCount
FROM stages s
LEFT JOIN questions q ON s.id = q.stageId
GROUP BY s.id, s.ageGroup, s.name
ORDER BY s.ageGroup, s.order;
